TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Jonathan_Ahdout, title = Jonathan_Ahdout, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jonathan_Ahdout} }

S.FORM: Jonathan Ahdout kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jonathan Ahdout, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Jonathan Ahdout kawas tay 1989, ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 3, Jonathan Ahdout, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: *onatħan aħ*out kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *onatħan aħ*out, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
